info.title: Kaneo API
info.description: Kaneo Project Management API - Manage projects, tasks, labels, and more

start.description: Shows the first few characters of the API key, including the prefix. This allows you to show those few characters in the UI to make it easier for users to identify the API key.

prefix.description: The API Key prefix. Stored as plain text.

userId.description: The owner of the user id

refillInterval.description: The interval in milliseconds between refills of the `remaining` count. Example: 3600000 // refill every hour (3600000ms = 1h)

enabled.description: Sets if key is enabled or disabled

rateLimitEnabled.description: Whether the key has rate limiting enabled

rateLimitMax.description: Maximum amount of requests allowed within a window

requestCount.description: The number of requests made within the rate limit time window

remaining.description: Remaining requests (every time api key is used this should updated and should be updated on refill as well)

permissions.description: Permissions for the api key (stored as JSON string)

callbackURL.description: Callback URL to redirect to after the user has signed in

errorCallbackURL.description: Callback URL to redirect to if an error happens

disableRedirect.description: Disable automatic redirection to the provider. Useful for handling the redirection yourself

nonce.description: Nonce used to generate the token

scopes.description: Array of scopes to request from the provider. This will override the default scopes passed.

requestSignUp.description: Explicitly request sign-up. Useful when disableImplicitSignUp is true for this provider

loginHint.description: The login hint to use for the authorization code request

image.description: The profile image URL of the user

callbackURL.description: The URL to use for email verification callback

rememberMe.description: If this is false, the session will not be remembered. Default is `true`.

callbackURL.description: Callback URL to use as a redirect for email verification

rememberMe.description: If this is false, the session will not be remembered. Default is `true`.

token.description: The token to reset the password

userId.description: The user id of the organization creator. If not provided, the current user will be used. Should only be used by admins or when called by the server. server-only. Eg: "user-id"

keepCurrentActiveOrganization.description: Whether to keep the current active organization active after creating a new one. Eg: true

organizationSlug.description: The organization slug to set as active. It can be null to unset the active organization if organizationId is not provided. Eg: "org-slug"

email.description: The email address of the user to invite

role.description: The role(s) to assign to the user. It can be `admin`, `member`, owner. Eg: "member"

organizationId.description: The organization ID to invite the user to

resend.description: Resend the invitation email, if the user is already invited. Eg: true

invitationId.description: The ID of the invitation to cancel
The ID of the invitation to accept
The ID of the invitation to reject

slug.description: The organization slug to check. Eg: "my-org"

memberIdOrEmail.description: The ID or email of the member to remove

organizationId.description: The ID of the organization to remove the member from. If not provided, the active organization will be used. Eg: "org-id"

role.description: The new role to be applied. This can be a string or array of strings representing the roles. Eg: ["admin", "sale"]

memberId.description: The member id to apply the role update to. Eg: "member-id"

organizationId.description: An optional organization ID which the member is a part of to apply the role update. If not provided, you must provide session headers to get the active organization. Eg: "organization-id"
The organization Id for the member to leave. Eg: "organization-id"

name.description: The name of the team. Eg: "my-team"

organizationId.description: The organization ID which the team will be created in. Defaults to the active organization. Eg: "organization-id"

teamId.description: The team ID of the team to remove. Eg: "team-id"

organizationId.description: The organization ID which the team falls under. If not provided, it will default to the user's active organization. Eg: "organization-id"

teamId.description: The ID of the team to be updated. Eg: "team-id"
The team the user should be a member of.

userId.description: The user Id which represents the user to be added as a member.

teamId.description: The team the user should be removed from.

userId.description: The user which should be removed from the team.

providerId.description: The provider ID for the OAuth provider

callbackURL.description: The URL to redirect to after sign in

errorCallbackURL.description: The URL to redirect to if an error occurs

newUserCallbackURL.description: The URL to redirect to after login if the user is new. Eg: "/welcome"

scopes.description: Scopes to be passed to the provider authorization request.

requestSignUp.description: Explicitly request sign-up. Useful when disableImplicitSignUp is true for this provider. Eg: false

scopes.description: Additional scopes to request when linking the account

errorCallbackURL.description: The URL to redirect to if there is an error during the link process

configId.description: The configuration ID to use for the API key. If not provided, the default configuration will be used.

refillAmount.description: Amount to refill the remaining count of the Api Key. server-only. Eg: 100

refillInterval.description: Interval to refill the Api Key in milliseconds. server-only. Eg: 1000

rateLimitTimeWindow.description: The duration in milliseconds where each request is counted. Once the `maxRequests` is reached, the request will be rejected until the `timeWindow` has passed, at which point the `timeWindow` will be reset. server-only. Eg: 1000

rateLimitMax.description: Maximum amount of requests allowed within a window. Once the `maxRequests` is reached, the request will be rejected until the `timeWindow` has passed, at which point the `timeWindow` will be reset. server-only. Eg: 100

rateLimitEnabled.description: Whether the key has rate limiting enabled. server-only. Eg: true

userId.description: User Id of the user that the Api Key belongs to. server-only. Eg: "user-id"

organizationId.description: Organization Id of the organization that the Api Key belongs to. Eg: 'org-id'

configId.description: The configuration ID to use for the API key lookup. If not provided, the default configuration will be used.

keyId.description: The id of the Api Key

userId.description: The id of the user which the api key belongs to. server-only. Eg: "some-user-id"

enabled.description: Whether the Api Key is enabled or not

rateLimitEnabled.description: Whether the key has rate limiting enabled.

rateLimitTimeWindow.description: The duration in milliseconds where each request is counted. server-only. Eg: 1000

rateLimitMax.description: Maximum amount of requests allowed within a window. Once the `maxRequests` is reached, the request will be rejected until the `timeWindow` has passed, at which point the `timeWindow` will be reset. server-only. Eg: 100

keyId.description: The id of the API key to delete
